window_summary: This window tracks the recent tmux/tmux release stream from version 1.8 through 3.6b, including major releases and bug-fix follow-ups. Each release note primarily points to the CHANGES file for details, with later releases also linking to GitHub issues for release notes.

questions.query_text: In the tmux/tmux repository, which release note explicitly states that it is a bug fix release of 3.0 and provides an AppImage package?

answer_support.answer_text: This is a bug fix release of 3.0. The release note directs users to the CHANGES file for a list of changes and mentions that tmux-3.0a.tar.gz is the source tarball and tmux-3.0a-x86_64.AppImage is an AppImage package for Linux.

questions.query_text: Across the tmux/tmux releases, how does the release note for tmux 2.9a differ from the release note for tmux 3.2a?

options.text: 2.9a is a bug fix release of 2.9 and only points to the CHANGES file, while 3.2a is a bug fix release of 3.2 and points to both the CHANGES file and a GitHub issue for release notes.
2.9a provides an AppImage, while 3.2a does not.
2.9a is a major release, while 3.2a is a minor release.
Both releases only point to the CHANGES file without any additional links.

questions.expected_answer: 2.9a is a bug fix release of 2.9 and only points to the CHANGES file, while 3.2a is a bug fix release of 3.2 and points to both the CHANGES file and a GitHub issue for release notes.

answer_support.answer_text: This is a bug fix release of 2.9. The release note directs users to the CHANGES file for a list of changes.
This is a bug fix release of 3.2. The release note directs users to the CHANGES file for a list of changes and to a GitHub issue for release notes.

questions.query_text: In the tmux/tmux release window, order the following release-content states from earliest to latest: (1) a release note that directs users to the CHANGES file and a GitHub issue for release notes, (2) a release note that only directs users to the CHANGES file, (3) a release note that is a bug fix release and only directs users to the CHANGES file, (4) a release note that is a bug fix release and directs users to both the CHANGES file and a GitHub issue for release notes.

answer_support.answer_text: The release note directs users to the CHANGES file for a list of changes.
This is a bug fix release of 2.9. The release note directs users to the CHANGES file for a list of changes.
The release note directs users to the CHANGES file for a list of changes and to a GitHub issue for release notes.
This is a bug fix release of 3.2. The release note directs users to the CHANGES file for a list of changes and to a GitHub issue for release notes.
